data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding recipient contact and channel.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Recipient contact + channel (email/SMS/link)', but the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to this requirement. While there are prior steps that involve customer sign-ups and bookings, none of them explicitly confirm the existence of recipient contact details or the specified communication channels. This lack of direct evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of 'Recipient contact + channel (email/SMS/link)' being captured or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
